title: Europe
wikitext:
'''Europe''' rather than its constituent nations is referenced as a single political entity in the Rebuild continuity. The 3rd Branch's designation as "Nerv EU" implies that a version of the '''E'''uropean '''U'''nion exists in this version of ''Eva''.

[[Asuka Langley Shikinami]] is a Captain in the European Air Force (though this may be an honourary rank) and Unit 02 was under the European Air Force's jurisdiction.

{{stub}}

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Places]]
[[Category:Rebuild of Evangelion]]
html:
Europe rather than its constituent nations is referenced as a single political entity in the Rebuild continuity. The 3rd Branch's designation as "Nerv EU" implies that a version of the European Union exists in this version of Eva.

Asuka Langley Shikinami is a Captain in the European Air Force (though this may be an honourary rank) and Unit 02 was under the European Air Force's jurisdiction.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
summary: Europe rather than its constituent nations is referenced as a single political entity in the Rebuild continuity. The 3rd Branch's designation as "Nerv EU" implies that a version of the European Union exists in this version of Eva.
